content.fact_text: Implemented a secure, high-performance schema-based input validation middleware for Express using Zod and Pino for structured logging.

provenance_data.behaviour: Intercepts HTTP requests, validates the body against a provided Zod schema, logs validation results (with PII redaction), injects validated data into the request object, and returns standardized 400 or 500 error responses. Uses correlation IDs for distributed tracing.
provenance_data.utility: Ensures that all incoming API requests strictly adhere to domain-defined schemas before reaching the business logic layer, preventing malformed data injection and enhancing security.
